messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The front desk reports itself healthy while it has stopped listening — a live process is not proof it is consuming
What it solves: THE GAP. Through the ~9h inbound outage of 2026-07-13 (the data-loss half is BL-369),
`.swarmforge/operator/front-desk-supervisor.status.json` reported `status: running` /
`attempts: 1` the whole way. The health signal tracks PROCESS LIVENESS — "is there a pid" — while
the thing that actually matte…
How it works: A front desk that has stopped listening is reported unhealthy
